deck.name: Hold the Pass
deck.text: Until end of turn, companions you control have GUARDIAN, +1 attack, and cannot be moved by opposing effects.
deck.flavor: —remembered words of Stonefall

deck.name: Greatsword of the Last Watch
deck.text: Equipped character has +4 attack and CLEAVE. When equipped character destroys a companion, draw a card. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Karessa of the Stonefall
deck.text: ZEALOUS, HIT & RUN. When this character destroys an opposing companion, draw a card.
deck.flavor: Few who came against her returned. Of those, none returned twice.

deck.name: Crackling Bolt
deck.text: Deal 3 damage to target character. This action cannot be countered.

deck.name: Heart of the Convergence
deck.text: When equipped character plays a Magic Action that deals damage, that action deals 2 additional damage. Equipped character has RECKLESS.

deck.name: Banner of the Stonefall
deck.text: Your Warrior companions have +1 attack while in the front line.

deck.name: Burning Eye
deck.text: Whenever you play a Magic Action, that action deals 1 additional damage to each character it would damage.
deck.flavor: An open flame that never closes.

deck.name: Wrath of the Untamed Sky
deck.text: Roll a six-sided die. Deal damage equal to the result to each opposing character. Then deal half that result, rounded down, to your own player character.
deck.flavor: The storm does not know whose side it is on.

deck.name: Shieldbreaker
deck.text: CLEAVE. (When this character attacks, it deals damage equal to its attack to each character on the same line as the target. CLEAVE requires a two-handed weapon to function.)

deck.name: Tempest-Born
deck.text: RANGED. When this enters, roll a six-sided die. Deal damage equal to half the result, rounded up, to target opposing character.

deck.name: Scorching Brand
deck.text: Equipped character has +2 attack. When equipped character attacks, deal 1 additional damage if you control a Magical Construct.

deck.name: Lingering Spark
deck.text: At the start of your turn, deal 1 damage to target opposing character.

deck.name: Ashforged Cleaver
deck.text: Equipped character has +3 attack and CLEAVE. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Berserker
deck.text: ZEALOUS, RECKLESS.

deck.name: Conflagration
deck.text: Deal 5 damage to target character. This character takes 1 damage.

deck.name: Press the Line
deck.text: Each companion you control in the front line attacks target opposing character.

deck.name: Pyre of the Unbound
deck.text: At the start of your turn, you may sacrifice this construct: deal 4 damage to target character or 2 damage to each opposing character.

options.label: Deal 4 damage to target character
Deal 2 damage to each opposing character

deck.name: Disarming Blow
deck.text: Target character you control attacks target opposing character. After damage, sacrifice an item equipped to that opposing character.

deck.name: Veteran of the Ashgrove
deck.text: When this enters, you may equip an item from your hand to this character.

deck.name: Plate of the Standing Wall
deck.text: ARMOR 4. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 4 armor counters, sacrifice it. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Ashforged Pendant
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. The first Magic Action equipped character plays each turn cannot be countered.

deck.name: Quartermaster
deck.text: KIT-MASTER. When this companion enters the encounter, you may move target item from one character you control to another character you control.

deck.name: Vael, the Unchecked
deck.text: ZEALOUS, RECKLESS. Whenever this character attacks, after damage is dealt, roll a six-sided die. On a 6, deal 3 damage to each opposing character.
deck.flavor: —what was left of the second tower, after

deck.name: Embercast Wand
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. Once per turn, when equipped character plays a Magic Action, draw a card.

deck.name: Mailed Hauberk
deck.text: ARMOR 2. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 2 armor counters, sacrifice it.

deck.name: Sparkflare
deck.text: Deal 2 damage to target character.

deck.name: Storm-Touched
deck.text: ZEALOUS. When this enters, deal 1 damage to target character.

deck.name: Wild-Eyed Pyromancer
deck.text: ZEALOUS, RECKLESS. When this character attacks, it deals 1 damage to itself.

deck.name: Tactical Reposition
deck.text: Move target character you control to any unoccupied slot. Draw a card.

deck.name: Wild Surge
deck.text: Roll a six-sided die. Deal damage equal to the result to target opposing character.

deck.name: Rally
deck.text: Until end of turn, companions you control have +1 attack.

deck.name: Ember Adept
deck.text: ZEALOUS. This character may attack without needing to first pass a willpower check.

deck.name: Storm-Mark
deck.text: At the start of your turn, roll a six-sided die. On a 4 or higher, deal 2 damage to target opposing character.

deck.name: Conscript
deck.text: ZEALOUS. This character may attack without needing to first pass a willpower check.

deck.name: Wildfire Sigil
deck.text: Whenever you deal damage to an opposing character with a Magic Action, deal 1 additional damage.

deck.name: Conflagration Mage
deck.text: ZEALOUS. At the start of your turn, deal 1 damage to each opposing character in the front line.
deck.flavor: He did not aim. The fire chose for him.

deck.name: Swift Strike
deck.text: Target character you control attacks an additional time this turn.

deck.name: Iron Sword
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack.

deck.name: Burning Heir
deck.text: ZEALOUS. When this character deals damage to an opposing companion, deal 1 damage to that companion's controller.

deck.name: Pikestaff
deck.text: Equipped character has +2 attack and RANGED. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Captain's Belt
deck.text: When this becomes equipped, you may move target item from one character you control to another character you control. Equipped character has +1 attack.

cardData.name: Storm-Caller's Mantle
cardData.text: ARMOR 1. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 1 armor counter, sacrifice it. Equipped character has +1 attack.

cardData.name: Steel Sword
cardData.text: Equipped character has +2 attack.

cardData.name: Spark from Nothing
cardData.text: Deal 1 damage to target character. Draw a card.

hand.name: Burning Hands
hand.text: Deal 2 damage to each opposing character on the same line as target character.

hand.name: Flame-Spinner
hand.text: When this enters, roll a six-sided die. On a 4 or higher, deal 2 damage to target opposing character. Otherwise, this character takes 2 damage.

hand.name: Widow's Fang
hand.text: Equipped character has +1 attack and HIT & RUN. (After this character attacks, it may take an extra move action.)

hand.name: Frontline Veteran
hand.text: ZEALOUS.

hand.name: Warmaster
hand.text: ZEALOUS, CLEAVE. (CLEAVE requires a two-handed weapon to function.)
hand.flavor: He had been at every gate. He knew which fell first.

_pc.name: You
_pc.text: Your Player Character. Cannot attack unless a weapon is equipped.

_hiddenCard.name: Mara, the Sworn Sword
_hiddenCard.text: ZEALOUS. When this character attacks, you may pay 1 HP from your player character: deal 1 additional damage.

deck.name: Convergence of Wills
deck.text: Each player returns all companions they control to their owner's hand.
deck.flavor: —Tomes of Urzal, scattered fragment

deck.name: Crystalline Sentinel
deck.text: Opposing back-line companions cannot attack.
deck.flavor: A held breath, frozen.

deck.name: Master of Foundations
deck.text: REINFORCE 3. When this enters play, add 3 Anchor counters to target Physical Construct you control. Your Physical Constructs do not lose Anchor counters at the start of your turn.

deck.name: Sigil-Strike
deck.text: Deal 3 damage to target character. If you control a Magical Construct, draw a card.

deck.name: Mason's Hammer
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. When equipped character destroys a Physical Construct, add 1 Anchor counter to a Physical Construct you control.

deck.name: Scribe's Apron
deck.text: ARMOR 1. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 1 armor counter, sacrifice it.

deck.name: Quill of Unmaking
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. As a Major Action, sacrifice this trinket: return target Construct to its owner's hand.

deck.name: Library of Memory
deck.text: At the start of your turn, you may return a card from your Dead Zone to your hand. If you do, exhaust this construct until your next turn.

deck.name: Shore Up
deck.text: Add 2 Anchor counters to target Physical Construct.

deck.name: Stone Rampart
deck.text: When Stone Rampart enters the encounter, add one Anchor counter to each of your other Physical Constructs.

deck.name: Binding Sigil
deck.text: Opposing companions in the front line lose all keywords.

deck.name: Memory Stone
deck.text: When equipped character is destroyed, return target card from your Dead Zone to your hand.

deck.name: Grudrik Stonebrace
deck.text: GUARDIAN. When this enters, add 2 Anchor counters to each Physical Construct you control.
deck.flavor: He laid the first stone and the last. Between them, everything stood.

deck.name: Quarry Hand
deck.text: When this enters, add 1 Anchor counter to target Physical Construct.

deck.name: Sigil-Bound Scholar
deck.text: When this enters, you may animate target Magical Construct you control as a 2/2 Manifest with its text and Anchor counters retained. If it would leave the encounter, sacrifice it instead.
deck.flavor: He read the binding aloud and the stone began to walk.

deck.name: Ward of Silence
deck.text: When an opponent plays an Action card, sacrifice this construct. That action is countered and placed in its owner's Dead Zone.

deck.name: Runic Convergence Staff
deck.text: Equipped character has +2 attack. Exhaust this staff: look at the top card of any deck.

deck.name: Greatmaul of the Foundation
deck.text: Equipped character has +3 attack and CLEAVE. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Siegeworks
deck.text: When one of your Physical Constructs is sacrificed, draw a card.

deck.name: The Long-Quiet Wall
deck.text: All companions you control have +1 attack. Opposing companions cannot attack characters on the line opposite this construct.

deck.name: Glassweaver Adept
deck.text: Once per turn, you may return target Magical Construct you control to its owner's hand.

deck.name: Bastion Wall
deck.text: Your front-line companions have GUARDIAN.
deck.flavor: Built once. Held forever, or so it was claimed.

deck.name: Patient Conjurer
deck.text: RANGED. When you play a Magical Construct, this character heals 1.

deck.name: Lens of Foretelling
deck.text: At the start of your turn, you may look at the top card of any deck and put it on top or bottom.

deck.name: Cipher-Keeper
deck.text: When this enters, draw a card.
deck.flavor: Every word preserved. Every word remembered.

deck.name: Iron Spikes
deck.text: Whenever an opposing companion attacks one of your companions, deal 1 damage to the attacker.

deck.name: Field Engineer
deck.text: When this enters, you may move one Anchor counter from one Physical Construct to another.

deck.name: Stonefern Mason
deck.text: REINFORCE 2. When this enters play, add 2 Anchor counters to target Physical Construct.

deck.name: Reflecting Pool
deck.text: When a Wizard companion you control would take damage, prevent 1 of that damage.

deck.name: Displacement
deck.text: Return target companion to its owner's hand.

deck.name: Tower Apprentice
deck.text: When this enters, look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on the bottom.
deck.flavor: Theory before practice, then practice for years.

deck.name: Engineer's Toolbelt
deck.text: When this becomes equipped, you may move target item from one character you control to another character you control. Equipped character has +1 attack.

deck.name: High Reader of the Convergence
deck.text: At the start of your turn, look at the top two cards of your deck. Put one on the bottom.

deck.name: Translocation Circle
deck.text: As a Minor Action, return a companion you control to its owner's hand.

deck.name: The Verdant Still
deck.text: When this enters, animate up to two Magical Constructs you control as 3/3 Manifest companions with their text and Anchor counters retained. If a Manifest would leave the encounter, sacrifice it instead.

deck.name: Anchor Stone
deck.text: Exhaust this trinket: add 1 Anchor counter to target Physical Construct.

deck.name: Pit Trap
deck.text: When an opposing companion moves into the front line, exhaust it and sacrifice this construct.

deck.name: Last Stand at the Gate
deck.text: Until end of turn, your companions have GUARDIAN, +1 attack, and cannot be reduced below 1 HP by damage.
deck.flavor: Few who came against the wall returned.

deck.name: Reinforced Gate
deck.text: Opposing companions cannot move between front and back lines.

deck.name: Foreman of the Gate
deck.text: GUARDIAN. While this character is ready and a legal target, opponents must attack it before any other character.

deck.name: Siege Engineer
deck.text: DISMANTLE 2. When this enters play, remove up to 2 Anchor counters from target Physical Construct. If it has no Anchor counters remaining, sacrifice it.

cardData.name: Eiralyth, the Still
cardData.text: RANGED. When this enters, target Magical Construct you control becomes a Companion with the type Manifest and Attack and HP equal to 4. It is no longer a Construct but retains its text and Anchor counters. If it would leave the encounter, sacrifice it instead.
cardData.flavor: She did not cast; she made the world consent.

cardData.name: Demolish
cardData.text: Remove up to 3 Anchor counters from target Construct. If it has no Anchor counters remaining, sacrifice it.

cardData.name: Foreman's Plate
cardData.text: ARMOR 2. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 2 armor counters, sacrifice it.

hand.name: Watchtower
hand.text: Your back-line companions may attack as if they had Ranged.

hand.name: Tripwire Snare
hand.text: When an opposing companion enters the encounter, deal 1 damage to it. Sacrifice this construct.

hand.name: Collapsing Tunnel
hand.text: As a Major Action, sacrifice this construct: deal 3 damage to all opposing back-line companions.

hand.name: Convergence Sigil
hand.text: When this enters, target opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws that many cards minus one. At the start of your turn, draw a card.

hand.name: Patient Study
hand.text: Look at the top three cards of your deck. Put one in your hand and the others on the bottom of your deck in any order.

hand.text: When an opposing companion enters the encounter, deal 1 damage to it. Sacrifice this construct.

hand.name: Collapsing Tunnel
hand.text: As a Major Action, sacrifice this construct: deal 3 damage to all opposing back-line companions.

hand.name: Convergence Sigil
hand.text: When this enters, target opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws that many cards minus one. At the start of your turn, draw a card.

deck.name: Hold the Pass
deck.text: Until end of turn, companions you control have GUARDIAN, +1 attack, and cannot be moved by opposing effects.
deck.flavor: —remembered words of Stonefall

deck.name: Greatsword of the Last Watch
deck.text: Equipped character has +4 attack and CLEAVE. When equipped character destroys a companion, draw a card. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Karessa of the Stonefall
deck.text: ZEALOUS, HIT & RUN. When this character destroys an opposing companion, draw a card.
deck.flavor: Few who came against her returned. Of those, none returned twice.

deck.name: Crackling Bolt
deck.text: Deal 3 damage to target character. This action cannot be countered.

deck.name: Heart of the Convergence
deck.text: When equipped character plays a Magic Action that deals damage, that action deals 2 additional damage. Equipped character has RECKLESS.

deck.name: Banner of the Stonefall
deck.text: Your Warrior companions have +1 attack while in the front line.

deck.name: Burning Eye
deck.text: Whenever you play a Magic Action, that action deals 1 additional damage to each character it would damage.
deck.flavor: An open flame that never closes.

deck.name: Wrath of the Untamed Sky
deck.text: Roll a six-sided die. Deal damage equal to the result to each opposing character. Then deal half that result, rounded down, to your own player character.
deck.flavor: The storm does not know whose side it is on.

deck.name: Shieldbreaker
deck.text: CLEAVE. (When this character attacks, it deals damage equal to its attack to each character on the same line as the target. CLEAVE requires a two-handed weapon to function.)

deck.name: Tempest-Born
deck.text: RANGED. When this enters, roll a six-sided die. Deal damage equal to half the result, rounded up, to target opposing character.

deck.name: Scorching Brand
deck.text: Equipped character has +2 attack. When equipped character attacks, deal 1 additional damage if you control a Magical Construct.

deck.name: Lingering Spark

cardData.flavor: She did not cast; she made the world consent.

deck.text: When this enters, animate up to two Magical Constructs you control as 3/3 Manifest companions with their text and Anchor counters retained. If a Manifest would leave the encounter, sacrifice it instead.

deck.name: Anchor Stone
deck.text: Exhaust this trinket: add 1 Anchor counter to target Physical Construct.

deck.name: Pit Trap
deck.text: When an opposing companion moves into the front line, exhaust it and sacrifice this construct.

deck.name: Last Stand at the Gate
deck.text: Until end of turn, your companions have GUARDIAN, +1 attack, and cannot be reduced below 1 HP by damage.
deck.flavor: Few who came against the wall returned.

deck.name: Reinforced Gate
deck.text: Opposing companions cannot move between front and back lines.

deck.name: Foreman of the Gate
deck.text: GUARDIAN. While this character is ready and a legal target, opponents must attack it before any other character.

deck.name: Siege Engineer
deck.text: DISMANTLE 2. When this enters play, remove up to 2 Anchor counters from target Physical Construct. If it has no Anchor counters remaining, sacrifice it.

deck.name: Crystalline Sentinel
deck.text: Opposing back-line companions cannot attack.
deck.flavor: A held breath, frozen.

cardData.name: Eiralyth, the Still
cardData.text: RANGED. When this enters, target Magical Construct you control becomes a Companion with the type Manifest and Attack and HP equal to 4. It is no longer a Construct but retains its text and Anchor counters. If it would leave the encounter, sacrifice it instead.
cardData.flavor: She did not cast; she made the world consent.

cardData.name: Demolish
cardData.text: Remove up to 3 Anchor counters from target Construct. If it has no Anchor counters remaining, sacrifice it.

cardData.name: Foreman's Plate
cardData.text: ARMOR 2. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 2 armor counters, sacrifice it.

hand.name: Watchtower
hand.text: Your back-line companions may attack as if they had Ranged.

hand.name: Tripwire Snare
hand.text: When an opposing companion enters the encounter, deal 1 damage to it. Sacrifice this construct.

hand.name: Collapsing Tunnel
hand.text: As a Major Action, sacrifice this construct: deal 3 damage to all opposing back-line companions.

hand.name: Convergence Sigil
hand.text: When this enters, target opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws that many cards minus one. At the start of your turn, draw a card.

hand.name: Patient Study
hand.text: Look at the top three cards of your deck. Put one in your hand and the others on the bottom of your deck in any order.

deck.name: Banner of the Stonefall

deck.name: Mailed Hauberk
deck.text: ARMOR 2. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 2 armor counters, sacrifice it.

deck.name: Scorching Brand
deck.text: Equipped character has +2 attack. When equipped character attacks, deal 1 additional damage if you control a Magical Construct.

deck.name: Rally

deck.name: Last Stand at the Gate
deck.text: Until end of turn, your companions have GUARDIAN, +1 attack, and cannot be reduced below 1 HP by damage.
deck.flavor: Few who came against the wall returned.

deck.name: Reinforced Gate
deck.text: Opposing companions cannot move between front and back lines.

deck.name: Foreman of the Gate
deck.text: GUARDIAN. While this character is ready and a legal target, opponents must attack it before any other character.

deck.name: Siege Engineer
deck.text: DISMANTLE 2. When this enters play, remove up to 2 Anchor counters from target Physical Construct. If it has no Anchor counters remaining, sacrifice it.

deck.name: Crystalline Sentinel
deck.text: Opposing back-line companions cannot attack.
deck.flavor: A held breath, frozen.

deck.name: Master of Foundations
deck.text: REINFORCE 3. When this enters play, add 3 Anchor counters to target Physical Construct you control. Your Physical Constructs do not lose Anchor counters at the start of your turn.

deck.name: Mason's Hammer
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. When equipped character destroys a Physical Construct, add 1 Anchor counter to a Physical Construct you control.

dead.name: Patient Study
dead.text: Look at the top three cards of your deck. Put one in your hand and the others on the bottom of your deck in any order.

dead.name: Sigil-Strike
dead.text: Deal 3 damage to target character. If you control a Magical Construct, draw a card.

cardData.name: Eiralyth, the Still
cardData.text: RANGED. When this enters, target Magical Construct you control becomes a Companion with the type Manifest and Attack and HP equal to 4. It is no longer a Construct but retains its text and Anchor counters. If it would leave the encounter, sacrifice it instead.
cardData.flavor: She did not cast; she made the world consent.

cardData.name: Demolish
cardData.text: Remove up to 3 Anchor counters from target Construct. If it has no Anchor counters remaining, sacrifice it.

cardData.name: Foreman's Plate
cardData.text: ARMOR 2. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 2 armor counters, sacrifice it.

cardData.name: Tripwire Snare
cardData.text: When an opposing companion enters the encounter, deal 1 damage to it. Sacrifice this construct.

cardData.name: Watchtower
cardData.text: Your back-line companions may attack as if they had Ranged.

b3.name: Opponent
b3.text: Your Player Character. Cannot attack unless a weapon is equipped.

gear.name: Scribe's Apron
gear.text: ARMOR 1. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 1 armor counter, sacrifice it.

_hiddenCard.name: Echoing Glyph
_hiddenCard.text: At the start of your turn, draw a card.
_hiddenCard.flavor: The mark repeats what was given to it.

f1.name: Convergence Sigil
f1.text: When this enters, target opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws that many cards minus one. At the start of your turn, draw a card.

b1.name: Library of Memory
b1.text: At the start of your turn, you may return a card from your Dead Zone to your hand. If you do, exhaust this construct until your next turn.

f3.name: Collapsing Tunnel
f3.text: As a Major Action, sacrifice this construct: deal 3 damage to all opposing back-line companions.

hand.name: Convergence of Wills
hand.text: Each player returns all companions they control to their owner's hand.

hand.name: Quill of Unmaking
hand.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. As a Major Action, sacrifice this trinket: return target Construct to its owner's hand.

options.label: Deal 4 damage to target character
Deal 2 damage to each opposing character

deck.name: Tempest-Born
deck.text: RANGED. When this enters, roll a six-sided die. Deal damage equal to half the result, rounded up, to target opposing character.

deck.name: Rally
deck.text: Until end of turn, companions you control have +1 attack.

deck.name: Storm-Touched
deck.text: ZEALOUS. When this enters, deal 1 damage to target character.

deck.name: Conflagration Mage
deck.text: ZEALOUS. At the start of your turn, deal 1 damage to each opposing character in the front line.
deck.flavor: He did not aim. The fire chose for him.

deck.name: Wild Surge
deck.text: Roll a six-sided die. Deal damage equal to the result to target opposing character.

deck.name: Plate of the Standing Wall
deck.text: ARMOR 4. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 4 armor counters, sacrifice it. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Tactical Reposition
deck.text: Move target character you control to any unoccupied slot. Draw a card.

deck.name: Disarming Blow
deck.text: Target character you control attacks target opposing character. After damage, sacrifice an item equipped to that opposing character.

deck.name: Embercast Wand
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. Once per turn, when equipped character plays a Magic Action, draw a card.

deck.name: Ashforged Cleaver
deck.text: Equipped character has +3 attack and CLEAVE. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Pikestaff
deck.text: Equipped character has +2 attack and RANGED. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Crackling Bolt
deck.text: Deal 3 damage to target character. This action cannot be countered.

deck.name: Veteran of the Ashgrove
deck.text: When this enters, you may equip an item from your hand to this character.

deck.name: Hold the Pass
deck.text: Until end of turn, companions you control have GUARDIAN, +1 attack, and cannot be moved by opposing effects.
deck.flavor: —remembered words of Stonefall

deck.name: Greatsword of the Last Watch
deck.text: Equipped character has +4 attack and CLEAVE. When equipped character destroys a companion, draw a card. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Ashforged Pendant
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. The first Magic Action equipped character plays each turn cannot be countered.

deck.name: Burning Hands
deck.text: Deal 2 damage to each opposing character on the same line as target character.

deck.name: Iron Sword
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack.

deck.name: Quartermaster
deck.text: KIT-MASTER. When this companion enters the encounter, you may move target item from one character you control to another character you control.

deck.name: Wildfire Sigil
deck.text: Whenever you deal damage to an opposing character with a Magic Action, deal 1 additional damage.

deck.name: Sparkflare
deck.text: Deal 2 damage to target character.

deck.name: Burning Heir
deck.text: ZEALOUS. When this character deals damage to an opposing companion, deal 1 damage to that companion's controller.

deck.name: Burning Eye
deck.text: Whenever you play a Magic Action, that action deals 1 additional damage to each character it would damage.
deck.flavor: An open flame that never closes.

deck.name: Conscript
deck.text: ZEALOUS. This character may attack without needing to first pass a willpower check.

deck.name: Berserker
deck.text: ZEALOUS, RECKLESS.

deck.name: Captain's Belt
deck.text: When this becomes equipped, you may move target item from one character you control to another character you control. Equipped character has +1 attack.

deck.name: Press the Line
deck.text: Each companion you control in the front line attacks target opposing character.

deck.name: Warmaster
deck.text: ZEALOUS, CLEAVE. (CLEAVE requires a two-handed weapon to function.)
deck.flavor: He had been at every gate. He knew which fell first.

deck.name: Vael, the Unchecked
deck.text: ZEALOUS, RECKLESS. Whenever this character attacks, after damage is dealt, roll a six-sided die. On a 6, deal 3 damage to each opposing character.
deck.flavor: —what was left of the second tower, after

deck.name: Wild-Eyed Pyromancer
deck.text: ZEALOUS, RECKLESS. When this character attacks, it deals 1 damage to itself.

deck.name: Heart of the Convergence
deck.text: When equipped character plays a Magic Action that deals damage, that action deals 2 additional damage. Equipped character has RECKLESS.

deck.name: Wrath of the Untamed Sky
deck.text: Roll a six-sided die. Deal damage equal to the result to each opposing character. Then deal half that result, rounded down, to your own player character.
deck.flavor: The storm does not know whose side it is on.

deck.name: Storm-Mark
deck.text: At the start of your turn, roll a six-sided die. On a 4 or higher, deal 2 damage to target opposing character.

deck.name: Shieldbreaker
deck.text: CLEAVE. (When this character attacks, it deals damage equal to its attack to each character on the same line as the target. CLEAVE requires a two-handed weapon to function.)

deck.name: Ember Adept
deck.text: ZEALOUS. This character may attack without needing to first pass a willpower check.

deck.name: Lingering Spark
deck.text: At the start of your turn, deal 1 damage to target opposing character.

deck.name: Karessa of the Stonefall
deck.text: ZEALOUS, HIT & RUN. When this character destroys an opposing companion, draw a card.
deck.flavor: Few who came against her returned. Of those, none returned twice.

deck.name: Conflagration
deck.text: Deal 5 damage to target character. This character takes 1 damage.

dead.name: Flame-Spinner
dead.text: When this enters, roll a six-sided die. On a 4 or higher, deal 2 damage to target opposing character. Otherwise, this character takes 2 damage.

dead.text: ZEALOUS.

deck.flavor: He read the binding aloud and the stone began to walk.

deck.flavor: Few who came against the wall returned.

deck.name: Reinforced Gate
deck.text: Opposing companions cannot move between front and back lines.

deck.name: Foreman of the Gate
deck.text: GUARDIAN. While this character is ready and a legal target, opponents must attack it before any other character.

deck.name: Siege Engineer
deck.text: DISMANTLE 2. When this enters play, remove up to 2 Anchor counters from target Physical Construct. If it has no Anchor counters remaining, sacrifice it.

deck.name: Crystalline Sentinel
deck.text: Opposing back-line companions cannot attack.
deck.flavor: A held breath, frozen.

deck.name: Master of Foundations
deck.text: REINFORCE 3. When this enters play, add 3 Anchor counters to target Physical Construct you control. Your Physical Constructs do not lose Anchor counters at the start of your turn.

deck.name: Mason's Hammer
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. When equipped character destroys a Physical Construct, add 1 Anchor counter to a Physical Construct you control.

dead.name: Patient Study
dead.text: Look at the top three cards of your deck. Put one in your hand and the others on the bottom of your deck in any order.

dead.name: Sigil-Strike
dead.text: Deal 3 damage to target character. If you control a Magical Construct, draw a card.

cardData.name: Eiralyth, the Still
cardData.text: RANGED. When this enters, target Magical Construct you control becomes a Companion with the type Manifest and Attack and HP equal to 4. It is no longer a Construct but retains its text and Anchor counters. If it would leave the encounter, sacrifice it instead.
cardData.flavor: She did not cast; she made the world consent.

cardData.name: Demolish
cardData.text: Remove up to 3 Anchor counters from target Construct. If it has no Anchor counters remaining, sacrifice it.

cardData.name: Foreman's Plate
cardData.text: ARMOR 2. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 2 armor counters, sacrifice it.

cardData.name: Tripwire Snare
cardData.text: When an opposing companion enters the encounter, deal 1 damage to it. Sacrifice this construct.

cardData.name: Watchtower
cardData.text: Your back-line companions may attack as if they had Ranged.

b3.name: Opponent
b3.text: Your Player Character. Cannot attack unless a weapon is equipped.

gear.name: Quill of Unmaking
gear.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. As a Major Action, sacrifice this trinket: return target Construct to its owner's hand.

_hiddenCard.name: Echoing Glyph
_hiddenCard.text: At the start of your turn, draw a card.
_hiddenCard.flavor: The mark repeats what was given to it.

f1.name: Convergence Sigil
f1.text: When this enters, target opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws that many cards minus one. At the start of your turn, draw a card.

b1.name: Library of Memory
b1.text: At the start of your turn, you may return a card from your Dead Zone to your hand. If you do, exhaust this construct until your next turn.

f3.name: Collapsing Tunnel
f3.text: As a Major Action, sacrifice this construct: deal 3 damage to all opposing back-line companions.

f2.name: Stone Rampart
f2.text: When Stone Rampart enters the encounter, add one Anchor counter to each of your other Physical Constructs.

b2.name: Grudrik Stonebrace
b2.text: GUARDIAN. When this enters, add 2 Anchor counters to each Physical Construct you control.

hand.name: Convergence of Wills
hand.text: Each player returns all companions they control to their owner's hand.

hand.name: Shore Up
hand.text: Add 2 Anchor counters to target Physical Construct.

hand.name: Binding Sigil
hand.text: Opposing companions in the front line lose all keywords.

hand.name: Memory Stone
hand.text: When equipped character is destroyed, return target card from your Dead Zone to your hand.

hand.name: Quarry Hand
hand.text: When this enters, add 1 Anchor counter to target Physical Construct.

deck.name: Storm-Touched
deck.text: ZEALOUS. When this enters, deal 1 damage to target character.

deck.name: Conflagration Mage
deck.text: ZEALOUS. At the start of your turn, deal 1 damage to each opposing character in the front line.
deck.flavor: He did not aim. The fire chose for him.

deck.name: Wild Surge
deck.text: Roll a six-sided die. Deal damage equal to the result to target opposing character.

deck.name: Plate of the Standing Wall
deck.text: ARMOR 4. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 4 armor counters, sacrifice it. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Tactical Reposition
deck.text: Move target character you control to any unoccupied slot. Draw a card.

deck.name: Disarming Blow
deck.text: Target character you control attacks target opposing character. After damage, sacrifice an item equipped to that opposing character.

deck.name: Embercast Wand
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. Once per turn, when equipped character plays a Magic Action, draw a card.

deck.name: Ashforged Cleaver
deck.text: Equipped character has +3 attack and CLEAVE. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Pikestaff
deck.text: Equipped character has +2 attack and RANGED. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Crackling Bolt
deck.text: Deal 3 damage to target character. This action cannot be countered.

deck.name: Veteran of the Ashgrove
deck.text: When this enters, you may equip an item from your hand to this character.

deck.name: Hold the Pass
deck.text: Until end of turn, companions you control have GUARDIAN, +1 attack, and cannot be moved by opposing effects.
deck.flavor: —remembered words of Stonefall

deck.name: Greatsword of the Last Watch
deck.text: Equipped character has +4 attack and CLEAVE. When equipped character destroys a companion, draw a card. (Equipped character cannot use Magic Actions.)

deck.name: Ashforged Pendant
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. The first Magic Action equipped character plays each turn cannot be countered.

deck.name: Burning Hands
deck.text: Deal 2 damage to each opposing character on the same line as target character.

deck.name: Iron Sword
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack.

deck.name: Quartermaster
deck.text: KIT-MASTER. When this companion enters the encounter, you may move target item from one character you control to another character you control.

deck.name: Wildfire Sigil
deck.text: Whenever you deal damage to an opposing character with a Magic Action, deal 1 additional damage.

deck.name: Sparkflare
deck.text: Deal 2 damage to target character.

deck.name: Burning Heir
deck.text: ZEALOUS. When this character deals damage to an opposing companion, deal 1 damage to that companion's controller.

deck.name: Burning Eye
deck.text: Whenever you play a Magic Action, that action deals 1 additional damage to each character it would damage.
deck.flavor: An open flame that never closes.

deck.name: Conscript
deck.text: ZEALOUS. This character may attack without needing to first pass a willpower check.

deck.name: Berserker
deck.text: ZEALOUS, RECKLESS.

deck.name: Captain's Belt
deck.text: When this becomes equipped, you may move target item from one character you control to another character you control. Equipped character has +1 attack.

deck.name: Press the Line
deck.text: Each companion you control in the front line attacks target opposing character.

deck.name: Warmaster
deck.text: ZEALOUS, CLEAVE. (CLEAVE requires a two-handed weapon to function.)
deck.flavor: He had been at every gate. He knew which fell first.

deck.name: Vael, the Unchecked
deck.text: ZEALOUS, RECKLESS. Whenever this character attacks, after damage is dealt, roll a six-sided die. On a 6, deal 3 damage to each opposing character.
deck.flavor: —what was left of the second tower, after

deck.name: Wild-Eyed Pyromancer
deck.text: ZEALOUS, RECKLESS. When this character attacks, it deals 1 damage to itself.

deck.name: Heart of the Convergence
deck.text: When equipped character plays a Magic Action that deals damage, that action deals 2 additional damage. Equipped character has RECKLESS.

deck.name: Wrath of the Untamed Sky
deck.text: Roll a six-sided die. Deal damage equal to the result to each opposing character. Then deal half that result, rounded down, to your own player character.
deck.flavor: The storm does not know whose side it is on.

deck.name: Storm-Mark
deck.text: At the start of your turn, roll a six-sided die. On a 4 or higher, deal 2 damage to target opposing character.

deck.name: Shieldbreaker
deck.text: CLEAVE. (When this character attacks, it deals damage equal to its attack to each character on the same line as the target. CLEAVE requires a two-handed weapon to function.)

deck.name: Ember Adept
deck.text: ZEALOUS. This character may attack without needing to first pass a willpower check.

deck.name: Lingering Spark
deck.text: At the start of your turn, deal 1 damage to target opposing character.

deck.name: Karessa of the Stonefall
deck.text: ZEALOUS, HIT & RUN. When this character destroys an opposing companion, draw a card.
deck.flavor: Few who came against her returned. Of those, none returned twice.

deck.name: Conflagration
deck.text: Deal 5 damage to target character. This character takes 1 damage.

dead.name: Flame-Spinner
dead.text: When this enters, roll a six-sided die. On a 4 or higher, deal 2 damage to target opposing character. Otherwise, this character takes 2 damage.

dead.name: Frontline Veteran
dead.text: ZEALOUS.

dead.name: Spark from Nothing
dead.text: Deal 1 damage to target character. Draw a card.

dead.name: Pyre of the Unbound
dead.text: At the start of your turn, you may sacrifice this construct: deal 4 damage to target character or 2 damage to each opposing character.

deck.text: DISMANTLE 2. When this enters play, remove up to 2 Anchor counters from target Physical Construct. If it has no Anchor counters remaining, sacrifice it.

deck.name: Crystalline Sentinel
deck.text: Opposing back-line companions cannot attack.
deck.flavor: A held breath, frozen.

deck.name: Master of Foundations
deck.text: REINFORCE 3. When this enters play, add 3 Anchor counters to target Physical Construct you control. Your Physical Constructs do not lose Anchor counters at the start of your turn.

deck.name: Mason's Hammer
deck.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. When equipped character destroys a Physical Construct, add 1 Anchor counter to a Physical Construct you control.

dead.name: Patient Study
dead.text: Look at the top three cards of your deck. Put one in your hand and the others on the bottom of your deck in any order.

dead.name: Sigil-Strike
dead.text: Deal 3 damage to target character. If you control a Magical Construct, draw a card.

dead.name: Convergence Sigil
dead.text: When this enters, target opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws that many cards minus one. At the start of your turn, draw a card.

dead.name: Library of Memory
dead.text: At the start of your turn, you may return a card from your Dead Zone to your hand. If you do, exhaust this construct until your next turn.

dead.name: Collapsing Tunnel
dead.text: As a Major Action, sacrifice this construct: deal 3 damage to all opposing back-line companions.

dead.name: Memory Stone
dead.text: When equipped character is destroyed, return target card from your Dead Zone to your hand.

dead.name: Convergence of Wills
dead.text: Each player returns all companions they control to their owner's hand.

cardData.name: Eiralyth, the Still
cardData.text: RANGED. When this enters, target Magical Construct you control becomes a Companion with the type Manifest and Attack and HP equal to 4. It is no longer a Construct but retains its text and Anchor counters. If it would leave the encounter, sacrifice it instead.
cardData.flavor: She did not cast; she made the world consent.

cardData.name: Demolish
cardData.text: Remove up to 3 Anchor counters from target Construct. If it has no Anchor counters remaining, sacrifice it.

cardData.name: Foreman's Plate
cardData.text: ARMOR 2. If the equipped character would be dealt damage, prevent all of that damage and put an armor counter on this item. When this item has 2 armor counters, sacrifice it.

cardData.name: Tripwire Snare
cardData.text: When an opposing companion enters the encounter, deal 1 damage to it. Sacrifice this construct.

cardData.name: Watchtower
cardData.text: Your back-line companions may attack as if they had Ranged.

f2.name: Stone Rampart
f2.text: When Stone Rampart enters the encounter, add one Anchor counter to each of your other Physical Constructs.

f3.name: Opponent
f3.text: Your Player Character. Cannot attack unless a weapon is equipped.

gear.name: Quill of Unmaking
gear.text: Equipped character has +1 attack. As a Major Action, sacrifice this trinket: return target Construct to its owner's hand.

_hiddenCard.name: Echoing Glyph
_hiddenCard.text: At the start of your turn, draw a card.
_hiddenCard.flavor: The mark repeats what was given to it.

b3.name: Binding Sigil
b3.text: Opposing companions in the front line lose all keywords.

f1.name: Grudrik Stonebrace
f1.text: GUARDIAN. When this enters, add 2 Anchor counters to each Physical Construct you control.

hand.name: Shore Up
hand.text: Add 2 Anchor counters to target Physical Construct.

hand.name: Sigil-Bound Scholar
hand.text: When this enters, you may animate target Magical Construct you control as a 2/2 Manifest with its text and Anchor counters retained. If it would leave the encounter, sacrifice it instead.
hand.flavor: He read the binding aloud and the stone began to walk.

hand.name: Ward of Silence
hand.text: When an opponent plays an Action card, sacrifice this construct. That action is countered and placed in its owner's Dead Zone.

hand.name: Quarry Hand
hand.text: When this enters, add 1 Anchor counter to target Physical Construct.
